title: Tunisian Tagine with Fluffy Rice
description: A flavorful and aromatic North African dish made with fluffy rice, herbal spices, and tender meat.

ingredients.name: tunisian spice mix
ingredients.notes: available at most Middle Eastern markets

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add the chopped carrots and sliced zucchini, cooking until the vegetables are tender.
Add the Tunisian spice mix and stir to combine.
Add the chicken broth and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10-15 minutes.
Add the chicken breast to the saucepan and cook until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve the chicken and vegetables over fluffy rice.
Garnish with fresh herbs, if desired.
